mapper.select:
SELECT member_id, nickname, email, role, status, provider, TO_CHAR(joined_at, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS joined_at, TO_CHAR(last_login, 'YYYY.MM.DD HH24:MI') AS last_login, reports, report_reason, TO_CHAR(last_report_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS last_report_date, processing_result, TO_CHAR(suspension_end_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS suspension_end_date FROM member
AND ( nickname LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR email LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR member_id LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
AND role = #{role}
AND status = #{status}
AND create_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND create_at <= TO_DATE(#{endDate} || ' 23:59:59', 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS')
ORDER BY create_at ASC
ORDER BY last_login DESC NULLS LAST
ORDER BY reports DESC, create_at DESC
ORDER BY joined_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET status = 'SUSPENDED', suspension_end_date = SYSDATE + #{days}, processing_result = #{days} || '일 정지 처분' WHERE member_id = #{id}
UPDATE members SET status = 'BLACKLISTED', suspension_end_date = TO_DATE('9999-12-31', 'YYYY-MM-DD'), processing_result = '영구 정지 처분' WHERE member_id = #{id}
UPDATE members SET status = 'ACTIVE', suspension_end_date = NULL, processing_result = '제재 해제 복원' WHERE member_id = #{id}
